---
title: "Experience and Skills"
toc: true
---

## Education 

::: {.pub-timeline}
::: {.pub-year}
August 2023 - Now
:::
::: {.pub-entries}
::: {.pub-entry}
**Postdoctoral Research Scientist**

[Reiser Lab](https://www.janelia.org/lab/reiser-lab), Howard Hughes Medical Institute (HHMI) Janelia Research Campus
:::
:::
:::

::: {.pub-timeline}
::: {.pub-year}
September 2016 - May 2023
:::
::: {.pub-entries}
::: {.pub-entry}
**PhD Student**

[Joesch Lab](https://ista.ac.at/en/research/josch-group/), Insitute of Science and Technology Austria (ISTA)
:::
:::
:::


::: {.pub-timeline}
::: {.pub-year}
June 2016 -  August 2016
:::
::: {.pub-entries}
::: {.pub-entry}
**ISTern**

[Hippenmeyer Lab](https://ista.ac.at/en/research/hippenmeyer-group/), Insitute of Science and Technology Austria (ISTA)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.pub-timeline}
::: {.pub-year}
July 2014 -  July 2015
:::
::: {.pub-entries}
::: {.pub-entry}
**Exchange Student**

University of Melbourne, Australia
:::
:::
:::


::: {.pub-timeline}
::: {.pub-year}
September 2012 -  May 2016
:::
::: {.pub-entries}
::: {.pub-entry}
**Natural Sciences MSci**

Univeristy College London (UCL)
:::
:::
:::


## Technical Skills

| Category | Skills |
|----------|--------|
| **Languages** | Python, MATLAB, SQL (Cypher/neuPrint), Javascript |
| **Data Engineering** | ETL pipelines, automated processing, Snakemake workflows |
| **Visualization** | Dash/Plotly, Matplotlib, Blender 3D rendering |
| **Data Science** | Statistical analysis, behavioral modeling, graph databases |
| **Tools & Platforms** | Git, GitHub Actions, Quarto, pixi, Jupyter |
